results.title: Extensive operations against suspects involved in serious crimes continue
results.description: FAISALABAD - Under the leadership of City Police Officer (CPO) Tanveer Hussain, the police carried out extensive operations against suspects involved in serious crimes during the current year, resulting in a significant decline in the crime rate across the city.

results.title: Commissioner awards Certificate of Appreciation to BISE Secretary
results.description: FAISALABAD - In recognition of his outstanding performance in ensuring transparency in the Intermediate (Part-I) Annual Examination 2026 and eliminating the cheating mafia in line with the vision of Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz Sharif, Commissioner and former Chairperson of the Board of Intermediate and Secondary Education (BISE).

results.title: Hot and humid air returns
results.description: Wednesday marks a noticeable change in our weather pattern. A strong area of high pressure will build across the Southeast, bringing plenty of sunshine and dry conditions. Afternoon temperatures will climb back to the low 90s, and that's just the beginning of a warming trend that lasts through the weekend.

results.title: DP World to pilot atmospheric water generation technology across global operations after strategic investment in Maithri Aquatech
results.description: DP World said the investment aligns with its broader sustainability strategy, which includes a target of achieving net positive water impact by 2030.

results.title: KGMU bans non-veg in hostel messes after governor flags hygiene lapses
results.description: KGMU spokesperson Prof KK Singh clarified that the restriction applies only to university-run hostel messes and cooperative kitchens. Students are free to consume non-vegetarian food purchased from outside or prepare it privately, but it will no longer be cooked or served in hostel messes, he said.

results.title: Trump welcomes Iraqi PM to White House, vows ‘a lot of deals’
results.description: US President Donald Trump and Iraqi PM Ali al-Zaidi have met at the White House pledging to deepen economic ties.

results.title: Dravid, Badani, Watson among contenders for CSK coaching role
results.description: Chennai, July 14: Chennai Super Kings (CSK) are set to begin the search for a new head coach following the departure of Stephen Fleming, with reports suggesting former captain MS Dhoni is expected to play a key role in identifying his successor ahead of the 2027 Indian Premier League (IPL) season. results.title: 10 herbs with great medicinal benefits to grow in your garden
results.description: You do not need a large garden to enjoy fresh herbs every day. A few pots, some sunshine and regular watering are enough to grow herbs that add flavour to meals and provide compounds that researchers continue to study for their health benefits.

results.title: China issues nationwide heat health alerts as extreme temperatures grip multiple regions
results.description: China's health and meteorological authorities on Monday issued nationwide heat health alerts as unusually warm and humid conditions continue to fuel widespread high temperatures across the country, with some areas expected to see temperatures exceed 40 degree Celsius in the coming days.

results.title: Insights | Africa strives to rehabilitate itself, with cooperation and solidarity as its key aspirations: Kenya scholar
China enters hottest days of summer
results.description: China entered the Sanfu period on Tuesday, the hottest and most humid stretch of the year, with the National Meteorological Center continuing to issue a yellow alert for high temperatures.

results.title: China's summer box office tops $440 million
results.description: China's 2026 summer movie season has generated more than 3 billion yuan (about $440 million) in box office revenue, including advance ticket sales, according to ticketing platform Maoyan.

results.title: Louis Vuitton takes China's IP regulator to court over trademark dispute
results.description: The Beijing Intellectual Property Court is scheduled to hear a trademark-related administrative case Thursday involving French luxury house Louis Vuitton and the China National Intellectual Property Administration (CNIPA), according to a public notice on the official court announcement platform.

results.title: Vietnam, Laos seek deeper cooperation between localities
results.description: Tam reaffirmed that the Vietnamese Embassy in Laos would continue acting as a bridge to promote cooperation between Vientiane province and Vietnamese localities and businesses, helping improve the effectiveness of joint projects in the coming years.
